description: 3 completely unrelated incidents: disk full, memory leak, network timeout. Should NOT cluster — expected 0 clusters (3 singletons).

alerts.text: Root filesystem 97.8% full. /var/log/nginx/access.log is 183GB and was never rotated. Nginx writes failing with ENOSPC.
Python worker memory usage increasing 50MB per hour. No memory being released. Heap growing unbounded. Likely object reference leak.
Network connection timeouts on external API calls. DNS resolution succeeding but TCP SYN packets not receiving ACK. Possible upstream firewall issue.
